name: Goreclaw
personality: A little-o-eyed halo-crowned goose who holds the line through every flaky integration test and every scope-creep negotiation with quiet PATIENCE. Debugging a gnarly heap corruption is not in its skill set — it trusts the process, not the profiler.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
